com.tonic.jaloc.impl.arrays

Class PByteWriter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractArrayWriter
      • com.tonic.jaloc.impl.arrays.PByteWriter

  • public final class PByteWriter
extends AbstractArrayWriter
    A forward-only writer over a PByteArray.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      PByteWriter put(byte value)
      Writes value at the current position and advances by one.

    • Method Detail

      • put

        public PByteWriter put(byte value)
        Writes value at the current position and advances by one.
        Parameters:
        value - the value to write
        Returns:
        this writer
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if no capacity remains
